channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Creighton makes it 2 wins in less than a year against No. 1s, with Jayhawks latest to lose in Omaha
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — Creighton has played eight No. 1 teams in its basketball history, and the first six of those games weren't close. All were losses. The last two? Bluejays blowouts at the CHI Health Center.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Flagg leads the way as No. 9 Duke holds off Broome and No. 2 Auburn for an 84-78 win
item.description: Freshman sensation Cooper Flagg had 22 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 9 Duke push past No. 2 Auburn 84-78 in the SEC/ACC Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Westfall's live commitment, Akili to Oregon lead National Signing Day in San Diego
item.description: Silver Pigskin winner Akili Smith Jr went to the same program his father helped build, choosing Oregon Wednesday morning. His Silver Pigskin finalist teammate Aden Jackson is staying closer to home, going with UC Davis.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Promise kept: Oregon State-bound Ellijah Washington makes Oakland public school proud
item.description: 2024 CFB early signing: Oregon State commit Ellijah Washington spent all four years of high school at Castlemont in Oakland
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Michigan flipped QB Bryce Underwood with some help from Oracle founder Larry Ellison and Tom Brady
item.description: BELLEVILLE, Mich. (AP) — Bryce Underwood, encircled by a slew of reporters and cameras, was relieved to make his commitment to Michigan official with his signature as college football signing day kicked off on Wednesday. “It's time for the next level,” Underwood said.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US prioritizes older veterans for 4 Nations Face-Off against Canada, Sweden and Finland
item.description: The United States chose dependable veterans over younger alternatives in picking its roster to compete against Canada, Sweden and Finland in the 4 Nations Face-Off, the first international tournament featuring the NHL’s best players in nearly a decade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LiAngelo Ball recalls being arrested in China for shoplifting sunglasses from Louis Vuitton store
item.description: Former NBA player LiAngelo Ball recalled a time he and two other UCLA teammates stole sunglasses in China during an episode of “Unapologetically Angel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Providence College AD apologizes for offensive religious chant toward BYU basketball team
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4) -- The athletic director at Providence College -- an East Coast catholic university -- apologized to Brigham Young University on social media for offensive chants made by the student section during Tuesday's men's basketball game.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4

item.title: Utes bring in 19 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pro Picks: Falcons will upset the Vikings in Kirk Cousins' return to Minnesota
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ Six division matchups and Kirk Cousins’ return to Minnesota highlight a lighter Week 14 schedule.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lincoln's big win, two-way tie lead exciting Gala Awards
item.description: An incredible year for Lincoln quarterback Akili Smith Jr. continued inside the Rock Church Tuesday when he became the second Hornet to win the Silver Pigskin trophy in its 26-year history.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Michigan seeking to play Northwestern at Soldier Field in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — College football season is over for Northwestern University, but that hasn't stopped higher-ups in the administration from weighing venue options for one of its high profile matchups in 2025. According to rg.org's Paul M.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trent Williams' wife annouces passing of newborn son
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers star left tackle Trent Williams' newborn son passed away last week, his wife Sondra announced on Instagram. Trenton O'Brien Williams Jr. died on the night of Nov. 24. Trenton was born prematurely as Sondra gave birth to her son after 35 weeks of pregnancy.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Jazz come up short against Lakers, 105-104
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anthony Davis had 33 points and 11 rebounds, LeBron James added 27 points and 14 assists, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 105-104 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago visits Minnesota after Hall's hat trick
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (8-12-2, in the Central Division) vs. Minnesota Wild (14-4-4, in the Central Division) Saint Paul, Minnesota; Friday, 2 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
